title: T-011 — API: Item deactivate (POST /api/technical/items/:item_code/deactivate) with V-TEC-05
prompt:
# T-011 — API: Item deactivate (POST /api/technical/items/:item_code/deactivate) with V-TEC-05

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §6.2, §6.4, §6.6
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Item deactivate endpoint enforcing reason + audit + status transition rules.

Reason enum mirrors UI TEC-081 modal options. blocked->active reverse path requires explicit approver_user_id property and owner permission. Active BOMs referencing this item should not be auto-deactivated.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/api/technical/items/[item_code]/deactivate/route.ts [create]
- lib/technical/items/lifecycle.ts [create]
- tests/api/items-deactivate.test.ts [create]

## Out of scope
- BOM side-effects
- UI

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given item active, when POST deactivate with reason='discontinued', then status='deprecated' and audit row written.
2. Given POST without reason field, when validated, then 422 returned.
3. Given item blocked, when POST to set active without approver_user_id, then 403 V-TEC-05 returned.
4. Given user without technical.items.deactivate, when POST runs, then 403.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for each reason path + missing approver case.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/api/items-deactivate.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not delete rows.
- Do not auto-deactivate dependent BOMs.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
